## Retired or superseded

- No meaningful concept-bearing file was deleted.
- As a reviewer route, older consolidation/re-audit bundles are superseded by `docs/audit/world_of_shadows_canonical_mvp_repair_2026-04-20/`, but they remain preserved on disk.

## Archive / demotion decisions

- The repair deliberately avoided copying the canonical MVP set into this audit folder.
- The actual canonical set remains under `docs/MVPs/world_of_shadows_canonical_mvp/`.
- `F_REPAIRED_CANONICAL_MVP_DOCUMENT_SET/README.md` acts as the manifest for that set to avoid creating a second competing copy.
